---
title: shiny
---

```{r knitr_config, include=FALSE}
source("~/github/how2/_knitr_config.R")
```

*********************************************************************

## widgets

*********************************************************************

## run from github

*********************************************************************

## css styling

selector | description
------------- | -------------
.selectize-input | 
.selectize-output | 
.shiny-plot-output | 
.shiny-text-output |
